final:
// // This module detects hazards by asserting a 'go' signal when no conflicts are detected.
module top_module(
    input [4:0] rs1_ID,
    input [4:0] rs2_ID,
    input rs1_valid,
    input rs2_valid,
    input [4:0] rd_EX,
    input memread_EX,
    input regwrite_EX,
    output stall
    );assign stall = 
    ( memread_EX && regwrite_EX && rs1_valid && (rs1_ID == rd_EX) )
    ||
    ( memread_EX && regwrite_EX && rs2_valid && (rs2_ID == rd_EX) );

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module detects hazards by asserting a 'go' signal when no conflicts are detected.
